_meta.description: Declared pillar capabilities for three system states of the DevOps agent (fictional AWS account 123456789012), used by the benchmark battery. `initial` = Chapter-2 starting point (fragmented tools, no graph). `mid` = after Part 2/3 (knowledge + memory + reasoning + planning, no tools yet). `violation` = a system that claims self-evolution while missing its knowledge-graph foundation (a dependency violation the layering forbids). Sources: Ch2 'The Eight Pillars of Agentic Graph Architecture', Table 2-1, 'The Initial State', 'The Transformation Arc'.
_meta.source: Agentic Graph RAG (O'Reilly) Ch2 — Architecture Foundations
